root.siteTitle: WazobiCare — Understand Your Medical Lab Results
root.siteDescription: Upload your medical lab results and get clear, simple explanations in Yoruba, English, Hausa, or Igbo. Powered by AI. Built for clarity.
root.ogDescription: Understand your lab results in your language.

nav.footerDisclaimer: For educational purposes only. Always consult a clinical provider.

dashboard.title: Dashboard — WazobiCare
dashboard.subtitle: Translate lab reports into Yoruba, Igbo, Hausa, or English

upload.title: Upload Lab Result — WazobiCare Nigeria
upload.description: Upload your medical lab result PDF or image to get a simple explanation.
upload.heading: Upload Your Lab Result
upload.subtitle: Upload a PDF or image of your lab results and our AI will translate each value in simple language — in your preferred local dialect.
upload.disclaimer: By uploading files, you agree that this translation is for educational clarity only. We do not store files permanently on our database.
upload.dropHere: Drop your lab result here or click to browse
upload.allowedFormats: PDF, JPG, PNG, WEBP — up to 16MB
upload.analyzingDesc: Our AI is reading and interpreting your results in Yoruba, Igbo, Hausa, and English.
upload.noReportId: Analysis completed without a report ID.
upload.timedOut: Analysis timed out. Please try again.
upload.serverTimeout: The analysis took too long for the production server. Please try again with a clearer image or a smaller file.

history.title: Report History — WazobiCare Nigeria
history.heading: Report History
history.subtitle: View, search, filter, or delete any of your past laboratory results.
history.noReportsDesc: Upload your laboratory result PDFs or images to get clear translations in Yoruba, Igbo, Hausa, or English.
history.deleteDialogDesc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this report? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings — WazobiCare Nigeria
settings.heading: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure translation options, audio settings, and language preferences.
settings.defaultDialectDesc: Choose the language you want your reports translated to by default.
settings.autoplayAudioDesc: Automatically play the text-to-speech reader when viewing a new lab result.
settings.emailNotificationsDesc: Send an email notification when your laboratory results processing is complete.

profile.heading: User Profile

profile.cantFindLga: Can't find your LGA? Type it manually
profile.saveFailed: Failed to save profile. Please try again.

completeProfile.heading: Complete your medical profile

signUp.unableToCreate: Unable to create account. Please try again.

report.title: Lab Report — WazobiCare Nigeria
report.processingDesc: AI is analyzing your file. This page will update once complete.
report.failedDesc: The AI could not extract readable lab data from this file. Try uploading a clearer scan.
report.doctorGuideDesc: Take this report to your doctor and ask about:
report.question1: Which values fall outside normal ranges, and what do they mean?
report.question2: What lifestyle or medication changes could improve my results?
report.question3: When should I schedule follow-up tests to track my progress?
report.disclaimer: WazobiCare provides educational translations only. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical decisions.
report.noInterpretation: No {language} interpretation is available for this report.
report.audioUnavailable: Audio is only available for Yoruba, Hausa, and Igbo.
report.igboAudioUnavailable: Igbo audio is not available yet.
report.audioGenerateError: Failed to generate report audio. Reference: {requestId}
report.audioNotAvailable: Audio is not available for this report.
report.audioGenerating: Generating {language} audio in the background. We'll play it when ready!
report.ttsNotSupported: Text-to-speech is not supported in your browser.

audioReader.title: Audio Reader — WazobiCare Nigeria
audioReader.description: Listen to your medical laboratory results translated in local dialects.
audioReader.noReportsDesc: You can listen to laboratory results in Yoruba, Igbo, Hausa, or English once a report analysis has been completed successfully.
audioReader.understandResults: Understand results by listening in your native dialect.
audioReader.healthEducationDesc: Translations are optimized for dialect comprehension. This is not a diagnosis. Discuss all health readings and summaries with a clinical provider.

demo.title: Demo Lab Report — WazobiCare Nigeria
demo.notAvailable: Demo report is not available. Contact support.
demo.demoModeDesc: A pre-loaded lab report showing how WazobiCare translates results across all four supported languages.
demo.demoFeature1: Switch between English, Yoruba, Hausa, Igbo
demo.demoFeature3: Listen to Yoruba & Hausa audio (real generated audio)
demo.demoNote: No API calls to Gemini. All data is from a real pre-loaded lab report.

landing.heroDesc1: Translate complicated medical jargon into easy-to-understand terms. Available in
landing.featuresDesc: No more Googling panic. We explain your metrics so you can have structured discussions with doctors.
landing.featureInstantUploadDesc: Drop medical lab result PDFs or snaps of papers directly from your device.
landing.featureAiAnalysisDesc: Gemini AI breaks down complex numbers and names into everyday terms.
landing.featureMultilingualDesc: Read explanations instantly in Yoruba, Igbo, Hausa, or English.
landing.featureListenOutLoudDesc: Clear audio translations let you hear and understand results on the go.
landing.featurePatientEducationDesc: Purely educational insights. We explain jargon so you can talk to your doctor.
landing.featureTrackHistoryDesc: Keep all previous lab reports in a clean, encrypted database dashboard.
landing.timelineDesc: Transforming hard results into simple answers takes four straightforward steps.
landing.step1Desc: Your reports are scanned in-browser with advanced encryption.
landing.step2Desc: We read your biometric values and reference ranges accurately.
landing.step3Desc: Complex medical terms map to simple everyday language phrases.
landing.step4Desc: Listen in your preferred local language with our natural voice reader.
landing.showcasePrivacyDesc: Our pipeline processes your documents using high-fidelity Optical Character Recognition (OCR). The system handles blurry mobile shots, extract tables, and flags ranges without storing health metrics permanently.
landing.showcasePrivacyBullet2: Temporary processing without session cookies tracking
landing.showcasePrivacyBullet3: Intelligent outlier detection for biometric metrics
landing.showcasePrivacyImageAlt: AI scanning lab results dashboard screen
landing.showcaseCultureDesc: Medical facts can feel distant when explained in sterile English. We structure definitions and summaries directly into cultural vernaculars like Igbo, Hausa, Yoruba, and Nigerian English.
landing.showcaseCultureBullet1: Colloquial terminology matching local health concepts
landing.showcaseCultureBullet2: High accuracy speech voice reader synthesis support
landing.showcaseCultureBullet3: One-tap real time language toggler controls
landing.accessibilityDesc: Our platform fully supports the screen-reader-friendly Web Speech API, enabling visually impaired or non-literate patients to listen to reports in their languages. Keyboard controls are enabled across the system.
landing.testimonialsDesc: See how WazobiCare helps families across Nigeria take control of their diagnoses.
landing.testimonial1Quote: As an elderly patient, lab sheets looked like a foreign code. Hearing my blood counts in Yoruba made me feel in control of my health.
landing.testimonial2Quote: My mother couldn't understand her cholesterol results. Translating them to Hausa let her understand the diet advice our doctor gave.
landing.testimonial3Quote: Excellent software. Simple, extremely accessible, and completely safe. Highly recommend to anyone seeking clarity on their tests.
landing.trust1Desc: We process documents temporarily and do not sell, trade, or share laboratory reports with any third-party providers.
landing.trust2Desc: All definitions match standard clinical reference guides. We show the exact range values from your raw document.
landing.trust3Desc: This software is for clarity. It assists your conversation with licensed general practitioners and does not diagnose.
landing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of patients understanding their records in seconds.
landing.footerDisclaimer: Disclaimer: WazobiCare leverages Gemini AI models for biometric context extraction. It is an educational tool and does not provide clinical diagnostic reports. Always discuss tests with certified clinical professionals.

pdf.disclaimerText: WazobiCare provides educational translations and AI-powered analysis of lab reports. This document is not a clinical diagnosis. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical decisions. Generated by WazobiCare Nigeria.
